case_title: FRANCISCO J.CIPRIANO ABARCA VS. SPECTRUM PAINTING AND DECORATING INC., A

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABARCA, FRANCISCO J.CIPRIANO AS TO DEFENDANT SPECTRUM PAINTING AND DECORATING INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABARCA, FRANCISCO J.CIPRIANO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPECTRUM PAINTING AND DECORATING INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $3,855.23 PRINCIPAL, $27.76 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,062.99, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
